channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Clothing Flytipped at the back of Churchdown Club in TBC car park, 9th April
item.description:
Overflowing clothing recycling bins and Flytipped clothes in the Chapel Hay Car Park, Churchdown

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chapel Hay Close, Churchdown, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several craters around mini roundabout, superficial repair when a bucket of tarmac was pressed into one of the craters.This has deteriorated once again.Please can warning signs, raised iron work signs, Danger uneven surface etc signs be placed here., 9th April
item.description:
Mini roundabout…Parton Road junction with Station Road and entrance to Churchdown PC offices.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parton Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole at the entrance of Leckhampton hill car park, 9th April
item.description:
Not been fixed but has been reported as fixed. As seen in the images from January to April.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartley Lane, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole at the entrance of Leckhampton hill car park, 9th April
item.description:
Not been fixed but has been reported as fixed. As seen in the images from January to April.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartley Lane, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive potholes everywhere, 9th April
item.description:
Because of the way cars are parked it makes it hard to avoid and people constantly cross out infront of you which makes it hard to avoid people and potholes very dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Gloucester Place, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 9th April
item.description:
At the entrance to Loverose Lane GL2 9QE there is Flytipping on both sides of the lane. A little further into the lane on the righthand side is the sofa. There are also 3 nitrous oxide canisters, 2 along the lane and 1 by the nearby footpath stile. I noticed the Flytipping today while on a walk. The site didn’t allow me to upload more than two photos.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frog Furlong Lane, Down Hatherley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 9th April
item.description:
Low overhanging branches over foopath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There appears to be subsidence in the road - it has been getting worse, 9th April
item.description:
W3W /anyone.artist.digits
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Road, Stoke Orchard, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road is ruined, 9th April
item.description:
This bit of road is ruined. There are no lines in the road either. Just resurface it instead of doing shoddy patch jobs.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
